message:
fix: add progressive fetching to 10 hooks that blocked on all clusters (#3271)

* fix: enable Claude Code CLI detection and improve agent approval dialog

Remove KC_ENABLE_CLAUDE_CODE env var gate from detection — the
AgentApprovalDialog already provides the user opt-in before any CLI
agent is invoked, making the env var redundant. Without it, Claude
Code (and any provider behind this gate) was never detected.

Also update dialog footer text to tell users they can disable agents
via the AI Agent toggle in the top navbar, replacing the less helpful
"clear site data" instruction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>

* fix: consolidate dual GitHub tokens into single FEEDBACK_GITHUB_TOKEN

The settings UI had two separate GitHub token inputs — a "Personal Access
Token" for read-only API proxying and a "Feedback GitHub Token" for issue
creation. Since the feedback token's `repo` scope is a superset of what
the main token needs, a single token handles everything.

Backend:
- Remove GitHubToken from AllSettings; use FeedbackGitHubToken everywhere
- Add migrateLegacyGitHubToken() for one-time encrypted field migration
- Add ResolveGitHubTokenEnv() helper (checks FEEDBACK_GITHUB_TOKEN, falls
  back to GITHUB_TOKEN for backward compat)
- Remove duplicate /api/feedback/token/* routes
- Update all handlers (proxy, feedback, missions, rewards) to use the
  single consolidated token

Frontend:
- Collapse two token inputs into one in GitHubTokenSection
- Remove legacy GITHUB_TOKEN localStorage keys
- Update settingsSync, settingsTypes, and usePersistedSettings
- Update FeatureRequestModal to use /api/github/token/status

Helm:
- Remove separate githubToken values/secret/deployment blocks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add progressive fetching to 10 hooks that blocked on all clusters

Cards using PVCs, Jobs, HPAs, ServiceAccounts, ReplicaSets, StatefulSets,
DaemonSets, CronJobs, Ingresses, and NetworkPolicies were waiting for
all clusters to respond before showing any data. A single slow or
unreachable cluster (10s timeout) blocked every card.

Added progressiveFetcher to all 10 hooks so partial data is pushed to
the UI immediately as each cluster responds, matching the pattern
already used by pods, events, deployments, and other hooks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>

---------

Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -75,13 +75,9 @@ github:
     clientId: github-client-id
     clientSecret: github-client-secret
 
-# GitHub token for server-side API access (nightly E2E status, etc.)
-githubToken:
-  token: ""
-  existingSecret: ""
-  existingSecretKey: github-token
-
-# GitHub token for issue creation from the Contribute dialog (requires repo scope)
+# GitHub token for all server-side API access (activity card, feedback, CI, missions, rewards)
+# Requires a PAT with repo scope for full functionality.
+# Set via FEEDBACK_GITHUB_TOKEN env var (GITHUB_TOKEN also accepted as alias).
 feedbackGithubToken:
   token: ""
   existingSecret: ""

+
+	"github.com/kubestellar/console/pkg/settings"
 )

@@ -204,7 +205,7 @@ func (h *MissionsHandler) githubGet(url string, clientToken string) (*http.Respo

 		req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+clientToken)
 		hasToken = true
-	} else if token := os.Getenv("GITHUB_TOKEN"); token != "" {
+	} else if token := settings.ResolveGitHubTokenEnv(); token != "" {
 		req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+token)
 		hasToken = true
 	}

+	// GitHubToken is the consolidated GitHub PAT used for all GitHub operations:
+	// API proxy (activity card, CI), feedback/issue creation, missions, and rewards.
+	// Resolved from FEEDBACK_GITHUB_TOKEN env var, falling back to GITHUB_TOKEN.

+	// Feature request/feedback configuration (repo targeting, not token)

 	FeedbackRepoName     string // GitHub repo name (e.g., "console")

+	// Feedback token routes removed — consolidated into /api/github/token/* endpoints

-export const STORAGE_KEY_GITHUB_TOKEN_DISMISSED = 'github_token_dismissed'

+export const STORAGE_KEY_GITHUB_TOKEN = 'github_token' // legacy, kept for cleanup
+export const STORAGE_KEY_GITHUB_TOKEN_SOURCE = 'github_token_source' // legacy, kept for cleanup
+export const STORAGE_KEY_GITHUB_TOKEN_DISMISSED = 'github_token_dismissed' // legacy, kept for cleanup

-  githubToken: string
+  /** Consolidated GitHub token for all operations (activity card, feedback, missions, rewards) */
